title: Better than Sniffers
description:
An immersive and challenging survival data pack
Inspired by the old mod "Better than Wolves".
read more...
body:
![better than sniffers logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80a00843574d965576770c05f885c570e1bd47d.png)
# We advanced to 26.1.2 !
## only the latest release is supported !

Better than Sniffers is a datapack inspierd by the mod "better than wolves" 
the goal of this pack is to recreate the survival experience in more realistic and more challanging way.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WXOHvQBJY0A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Notice the bug? Want to suggest a feature ?
[Github](https://github.com/dvirov/better_than_sniffers/issues/new/choose)|
[discord](https://discord.gg/gXSEPRdydK)

<details>
<summary>Where to find the resourcepack?
</summary>


Go to the [version page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better_than_sniffers/versions) and find the version you want that labeled as datapack.

Click on the version and fine the attached files at the bottom and download the file named "Better than Sniffers-RP".

please keep in mind that every RP version work only with the matching DP version
Have fun !
## 
## ![resourcepack tutorial 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f2041aa9c17479ae1a975c365a87ed9775564e.png)
## 
![resourcepack tutorial 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52219fb630936127b13e93e4b99c482de4335b7.png)


</details>




#### Advancements

I recommend looking at the advancements from time to time
As you progress, more advancements will be revealed and you will be able to know what options you have and where you can progress


## The beginning

### Rocks
The rocks are probably the first thing you want to find.
They are spread on the surface in all biomes.
On the rocks you can find small pebbles
To pick them up R-click on them or mine them
![rock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e51ecaae7032303859075d8994a177a00fb4fe59.png)

### Smashing pebbels / Flint

After you collect the pebbles you can hit any kind of stone with them and smash them with a 50% chance of getting flint
Flints can be used to get more sticks when breaking leaves
or to create basic tools

### Knife

A knife is used to cut ferns and grass into plant fiber (strings)
The chance is relatively low so dont worry if it takes a while to find some
A knife can be made from all materials, but flint will be the most available

### healing
As you probably noticed natural regeneration is disabled
To renew life you need to make a bandage from 4 plant fiber
and use it

![bandage1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26505724929cc8218eb1de2df046f6cb4f8aa3c6.png)
![bandage2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/188842f5bb3012a3f09e2a8e8fbf30d2af00b957.png)

### Crops
You can plant and farm a variety of plants
If you break grass and ferns there is a small chance that you will get seeds of different plants
Some of the plants can be used for food and some for other things

![crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00217652032f0956c210c31de6766ad646630383.png)

### Food
There are many ways to get food
You can grow plants or animals
 Just don't forget to save some food for the winter
 
### Tools
There are several types of tools in the game and each type has different materials from which it can be made
The more advanced and stronger the material, the more it gives you access to breaking stronger blocks and also lasts longer


### Pillager Camps
The pilgers have set up camp in the world around you
There's a chance you'll find some useful materials to start with, but be careful! They often contain enemies

### Sculpture tool
To create more advanced tools you need a crafting table
The sculpting tool lets you carve a log into crafting table
Note! You cannot move the table in the early stages of the game

### Storage Pots
Storage pots can be crafted from 7 bricks.
Bricks can be made from a ball of clay wich drops from dirt
R-click on the pot to extract the items

## New Game Mechanics

### Animals Behavior
Most animals are no longer passive but neutral
This means that if you attack them they will attack you back!
In addition more animals can drop different types of meat/leather/fur


### Campfire
A campfire is one of the most important things, at least in the beginning
It provides light and heat at night,  cook food and make torches
to craft campfire you need 4 wood slabs and 3 sticks,
and to ignite the campfire you gonna need fire plough and some coal or other fuel to keep it lit

![campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d9580ebaf8923bba92c9e5f845e0d4906f9ca3.png)

### Movement 
There are some small changes to the movement
1. Your jump height is exactly 1 block
2. Wall running is possible for a short distance
3. If you are close to the edge of a block above which there is air, if you press shift+jump you can climb it (see picture)
4. If you fall from a high place
Pressing right and left together will brake the fall at the cost of a large amount of stamina
### stamina
Every time you perform a tiring action like jumping or running your stamina bar will decrease a bit. If the bar reaches zero you will suffer slowness and hunger until the bar fills back up
To replenish the bar simply stand still and wait a few moments

![stamina](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20218a71462e7dcae471e3b20911c982165ad836.png)

### Temperature
The temperature bar is pretty simple if you are in a place that is too cold or too hot you will start taking damage So you should keep an eye on it

![temperature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8574a4b248fb6332233a13c77c58c7f26ceab624.png)

### Sanity
The sanity bar is affected by actions the player takes
Like eating raw food or staying in the dark and cold for a long time
The opposite actions will help keep the meter high
This meter determines events that can happen around you like
Stronger monsters will appear and you will lose hunger
Things will start disappearing around you 
so don't lose your sanity

![sanity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3fb1750ab7aa9cdef9d4193c7b3c45a9308eac2.png)

### Seasons
As you can imagine there are 4 seasons
Each season affects the game in a different way
from temperature and weather
and up to the spawning of animals

## crafting stations
### Cooking pot
Used for making hot and more nutritious food
Requires a lit campfire under it

### Crucible
Used to melt materials together
Mainly for steel production
Requires a lit campfire under it

### Fletching 
Used to make arrows

### Anvil
Used to forge tools from advanced metals such as steel
To use it you have to place a steel ingot in it and hit it with a hammer
